title: ANs-7e sensor unit
content:
{{Top|canon=ANs-7e forward sensor}}
The '''ANs-7e sensor unit''' was a type of [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] suite that was manufactured by [[Fabritech/Legends|Fabritech]] and could be found on the [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptor]] in service with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. The suites were equipped with [[PA-94 long-range phased tachyon detection array/Legends|PA-94 long range phased tachyon detection arrays]] and [[PG-7u short-range primary threat analysis grid/Legends|PG-7u short range primary threat analysis grids]].
